testcase.name: test_01_support_pod_loads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_task_workflow.py:57: in test_01_support_pod_loads assert data["athlete"]["athlete_id"] == ATHLETE_ID ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'athlete_id'

testcase.name: test_completed_tasks_have_all_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Task 8aefbb14-5d07-4ed1-90ca-752e3b48ddb3 missing completed_by assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9706b425f80>('completed_by') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9706b425f80> = {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'completed_at': '2026-03-12T01:59:56.238518+00:00', 'created_at': '2026-03-06T22:12:47.892169+00:00', 'created_by': 'Coach Martinez', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_task_workflow.py:361: in test_completed_tasks_have_all_fields assert task.get("completed_by") is not None, f"Task {task['id']} missing completed_by" E AssertionError: Task 8aefbb14-5d07-4ed1-90ca-752e3b48ddb3 missing completed_by E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9706b425f80>('completed_by') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9706b425f80> = {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'completed_at': '2026-03-12T01:59:56.238518+00:00', 'created_at': '2026-03-06T22:12:47.892169+00:00', 'created_by': 'Coach Martinez', ...}.get
